source_version: Treehouse Tumor Compendium 25.01 PolyA samples selected by TCGA provenance (hugo_log2tpm_58581genes_2025-02-27); downloaded from public.gi.ucsc.edu/~ekephart/public-data/; HUGO symbols harmonized to Ensembl release 112; log2(TPM+1) inverse-transformed
notes: Per-sample TPMs from Treehouse Tumor Compendium 25.01 PolyA samples selected by TCGA provenance (hugo_log2tpm_58581genes_2025-02-27); downloaded from public.gi.ucsc.edu/~ekephart/public-data/. Sample selection: clinical.disease == 'adrenocortical carcinoma'. HUGO symbols mapped to Ensembl release 112; duplicate symbol mappings dropped. TPM_clean is three-compartment fixed-fraction: ribosomal-protein genes are pinned to 16% of the 1e6 budget, other technical-RNA to 9%, and the remaining (biological) genes to 75%, each renormalized within its compartment (within-compartment ratios preserved; cohort-independent; curated cancer targets never censored). The biological compartment lands on a constant 750k in every sample. TCGA-provenance samples only: filtered via `th_dataset_id.startswith('TCGA')` against Treehouse's compendium-wide disease label. Treehouse-internal samples with the same disease are excluded from this row.

source_version: PMID 40506428 (Bartl 2025 salivary gland cancer panel, Supplementary Dataset 1); unit=TPM; canonicalized with oncoref expression_engine; clean_tpm=16/9/75
notes: Bartl 2025 salivary-gland cancer bulk RNA-seq panel: 95 matrix rows from 93 RNA-sequenced patients. Supplementary Dataset 1 Table 1 routes ACC to ADCC (n=57, including repeated P-58 and P-77 biopsies) and AciCC to ACINIC (n=3). The remaining 35 adenocarcinoma, BCC, CEPA, MEC, SDC, mesenchymal, and other samples are excluded from histology-specific artifacts. The matrix is transposed (rows = samples, cols = versioned Ensembl IDs).

Sample selection: clinical.disease == 'kidney clear cell carcinoma'. HUGO symbols mapped to Ensembl release 112; duplicate symbol mappings dropped. TPM_clean is three-compartment fixed-fraction: ribosomal-protein genes are pinned to 16% of the 1e6 budget, other technical-RNA to 9%, and the remaining (biological) genes to 75%, each renormalized within its compartment (within-compartment ratios preserved; cohort-independent; curated cancer targets never censored). The biological compartment lands on a constant 750k in every sample. TCGA-provenance samples only: filtered via `th_dataset_id.startswith('TCGA')` against Treehouse's compendium-wide disease label. Treehouse-internal samples with the same disease are excluded from this row.

The biological compartment lands on a constant 750k in every sample. TCGA-provenance samples only: filtered via `th_dataset_id.startswith('TCGA')` against Treehouse's compendium-wide disease label. Treehouse-internal samples with the same disease are excluded from this row.

source_version: SCLC UCologne 2015 (George 2015, PMID 26168399) RNA-seq FPKM from cBioPortal datahub sclc_ucologne_2015; FPKM → TPM by per-sample sum-to-1e6; HUGO symbols harmonized to Ensembl release 112
notes: Per-sample TPMs from SCLC UCologne 2015 (n=81 RNA-seq samples; some patients also have microarray which is not included here). source_version: SCLC UCologne 2015 FPKM (George 2015 PMID 26168399) × TF-dominance subtype assignment (max TPM of ASCL1 / NEUROD1 / POU2F3 / YAP1 per sample)
